events.title: Launch of the French-Brazilian AURELA Research Project
events.summary: AURELA is a four-year Franco-Brazilian research program funded by CAPES-COFECUB and bringing together six universities in Brazil and France. The program explores key challenges in EU–Latin America relations, focusing on sustainability, security and emerging technologies, and democratic governance.

events.title: The Impossible State Live Podcast: What is North Korea learning from Russia's war in Ukraine?
events.institution_full: Center for Strategic and International Studies
events.summary: The Impossible State Live Podcast: What is North Korea learning from Russia's war in Ukraine? Please join this special episode of The Impossible State Live podcast on how the Ukraine war is reshaping warfare, what North Korea may learn from Russia, and the implications for Korean Peninsula security. Event — June 29, 2026
